sentences.arabic: أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أَحْمِلَ ذِكْرَى مِنْ رِحْلَتِي فَذَهَبْتُ إِلَى دُكَّانِ التَّذَكَّارَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Htio sam ponijeti sjećanje s putovanja pa sam otišao u suvenirsku prodavnicu.
sentences.translationEn: I wanted to take a memory from my trip, so I went to the souvenir shop.

sentences.arabic: رَأَيْتُ أَشْيَاءَ صَغِيرَةً تُمَثِّلُ ثَقَافَةَ الْبِلَادِ.
sentences.translation: Vidio sam male predmete koji predstavljaju kulturu te zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: I saw small items representing the country's culture.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ مِفْتَاحًا بِشَكْلِ نُجُومٍ وَكِتَابًا صَغِيرًا عَنِ التَّارِيخِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam privjesak u obliku zvijezde i malu knjižicu o historiji.
sentences.translationEn: I bought a star-shaped keychain and a small book about history.

sentences.arabic: أَرْسَلْتُ بَطَاقَةً بَرِيدِيَّةً لِأُمِّي مَكْتُوبًا عَلَيْهَا: «أُفَكِّرُ فِيكِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.» كَانَتِ الْهَدَايَا صَغِيرَةً لَكِنَّهَا مَلِيئَةٌ بِالْمَعْنَى.
sentences.translation: Poslao sam razglednicu majci na kojoj je pisalo: "Svaki dan mislim na tebe." Pokloni su bili mali, ali puni značenja.
sentences.translationEn: I sent a postcard to my mother with the words: "I think of you every day." The gifts were small but full of meaning.
